artifacts.reason: The joined TP8 discovery receipt remains in the private campaign ledger and binds the GPU-proven predecessor tree rather than the final static-only normalized head.
The exact GPU-proven worker wheel was retained only by digest in the private campaign ledger.
The exact GPU-proven worker image was retained in the private pod registry and recorded only by manifest digest in the campaign ledger.
The final normalized head's 68-pass focused pod summary was reported without retaining the raw log.
The GPU-proven predecessor tree's 401-pass focused result and earlier 1509-pass, 3-skip, 1-deselection broad summary were reported without retaining raw logs.

claims.statement: The implementation adds an inspectable pinned-SGLang patch proposal, policy-bounded hermetic overlay build, scheduler-child activation proof, and discovery qualification product without granting target or stack mutation authority.
The retained GitHub receipt records successful evidence and CodeQL checks for the final normalized implementation head.

Digest-retained TP8 evidence binds scheduler-only eight-rank candidate activation, B/C/B-prime/T completion, independent reopen, graph-requested execution, and zero residue on the GPU-proven predecessor tree.
The harmless discovery marker was correctly rejected for measured speed regression; the receipt is infrastructure proof, not a throughput win or crown.

exit_criteria.statement: Discovery proposals are bounded source products whose materialization and activation are validator-owned and whose output cannot directly mutate the catalog, evaluation stack, settlement, or weights.
The digest-retained GPU-proven tree completed the discovery B/C/B-prime/T infrastructure proof and rejected its regressing marker candidate.
The final static-normalized head was reported to pass 68 focused pod tests; the raw log is unavailable.
The repository-retained GitHub receipt binds successful evidence checks to the final implementation head.

reviews.summary: A clean whole-scope implementation review was reported; no report bytes were retained.

A clean receipt-semantics confirmation was reported; no report bytes were retained.
